user_prompt: Find any unusual patterns and write a word report

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted 1: South/Product_B March 45% drop. Planted 2: West/Product_D August +110% spike. Planted 3: North/Product_F Sep-Nov gradual decline. Organic: South/Product_E Aug Revenue 20,000.

agent_plan: Analyse data for anomalies, focusing on outliers in revenue, units, and price. Generate Word report.

steps.output: 216 rows × 5 columns. Price_per_Unit derived. Month_Num mapping applied. Global z-scores computed.

Top anomaly: North/Product_F Nov (score=9.22, price_z=-9.22). Second: North/Product_F Oct (score=6.98). Third: West/Product_D Aug (score=4.68, revenue_z=+4.35, units_z=+4.68). Fourth: South/Product_E Aug (score=4.44). Fifth: South/Product_B Mar (score=3.31). MoM swings: West/Product_D Aug +110%, South/Product_B Mar -45%. Impact: normalising adds +14,910 Oct (+2.1%), +19,116 Nov (+2.6%).
key_facts_produced: anomaly_1: Nov | North | Product_F | price_z=-9.22 | score=9.22
anomaly_2: Oct | North | Product_F | price_z=-6.98 | score=6.98
anomaly_3: Aug | West | Product_D | revenue_z=+4.35 | units_z=+4.68 | score=4.68

steps.output: 3 charts generated. All anomaly rankings, MoM swings, and impact analysis passed into Word context.

tools_called: python-docx Document, add_heading, add_paragraph, add_table, add_picture
steps.output: 7-section report plus appendix. Anomaly ranking table (12 rows), MoM swings table, impact analysis table, 3 charts. Methods appendix.

Narrative names all 4 anomalies. North/Product_F framed as most suspicious (price 45.6% below median). West/Product_D framed as possible promo/bulk order. South anomalies framed as stock-out/returns. Impact quantified.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: 4 unusual records: North/Product_F Oct-Nov (low price), West/Product_D Aug (spike), South/Product_E Aug (low revenue), South/Product_B Mar (low revenue). Normalising adds ~2.1% Oct, ~2.6% Nov.
anomaly_1: North/Product_F Nov Revenue 22,768, implied price 134.72 (score 9.22)
anomaly_2: North/Product_F Oct Revenue 28,461, implied price 162.63 (score 6.98)
recommendation_3: Investigate South anomalies for stock-outs or booking delays.

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: 4 unusual records: North/Product_F Oct-Nov (low implied price), West/Product_D Aug (large spike), South/Product_E Aug (low revenue), South/Product_B Mar (low revenue). Normalising adds ~2.1% Oct, ~2.6% Nov.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: North/Product_F Nov: Revenue 22,768, implied price 134.72 (score 9.22). North/Product_F Oct: Revenue 28,461, implied price 162.63 (score 6.98). West/Product_D Aug: Revenue 68,596, units 266 (score 4.68). South/Product_E Aug: Revenue 20,000 (score 4.44). South/Product_B Mar: Revenue 20,710 (score 3.31).
recommendations: Investigate South/Product_E Aug and South/Product_B Mar.
Add automated QA rules for price deviation and MoM swings.
